2604.11786.title: GenTac: Generative Modeling and Forecasting of Soccer Tactics
2604.11786.paper_summary: Modeling open-play soccer tactics is a formidable challenge due to the stochastic, multi-agent nature of the game. Existing computational approaches typically produce single, deterministic trajectory forecasts or focus on highly structured set-pieces, fundamentally failing to capture the inherent variance and branching possibilities of real-world match evolution. Here, we introduce GenTac, a diffusion-based generative framework that conceptualizes soccer tactics as a stochastic process over continuous multi-player trajectories and discrete semantic events. By learning the underlying distribution of player movements from historical tracking data, GenTac samples diverse, plausible, long-horizon future trajectories. The framework supports rich contextual conditioning, including opponent behavior, specific team or league playing styles, and strategic objectives, while grounding continuous spatial dynamics into a 15-class tactical event space. Extensive evaluations on our proposed benchmark, TacBench, demonstrate four key capabilities: (1) GenTac achieves high geometric accuracy while strictly preserving the collective structural consistency of the team; (2) it accurately simulates stylistic nuances, distinguishing between specific teams (e.g., Auckland FC) and leagues (e.g., A-League versus German leagues); (3) it enables controllable counterfactual simulations, demonstrably altering spatial control and expected threat metrics based on offensive or defensive guidance; and (4) it reliably anticipates future tactical outcomes directly from generated rollouts. Finally, we demonstrate that GenTac can be successfully trained to generalize to other dynamic team sports, including basketball, American football, and ice hockey.
2604.11786.paper_summary_zh: 建模開放式足球戰術是一項艱鉅的挑戰，因為比賽具有隨機性和多代理的特性。現有的計算方法通常產生單一的確定性軌跡預測，或專注於高度結構化的定點球，根本無法捕捉現實比賽演變的固有變異性和分支可能性。在此，我們介紹了GenTac，一個基於擴散的生成框架，將足球戰術概念化為連續多玩家軌跡和離散語義事件上的隨機過程。通過從歷史追蹤數據中學習球員移動的基本分佈，GenTac能夠抽樣多樣化、合理的長期未來軌跡。該框架支持豐富的上下文條件，包括對手行為、特定球隊或聯賽的比賽風格以及戰略目標，同時將連續空間動態基於15類戰術事件空間進行基礎化。在我們提出的基準TacBench上進行的廣泛評估顯示了四個關鍵能力：（1）GenTac在嚴格保持團隊的集體結構一致性的同時，實現了高幾何精度；（2）它準確模擬風格細微差異，區分特定球隊（例如，奧克蘭FC）和聯賽（例如，A聯賽與德國聯賽）；（3）它使可控的反事實模擬成為可能，根據進攻或防守指導顯著改變空間控制和預期威脅指標；（4）它可靠地從生成的展開中預測未來戰術結果。最後，我們展示了GenTac可以成功訓練以泛化到其他動態團隊運動，包括籃球、美式足球和冰球。
2604.11786.author: Jiayuan Rao et.al.
2604.11786.authors: Jiayuan Rao, Tianlin Gui, Haoning Wu, Yanfeng Wang, Weidi Xie
